desc.en: Practical AI automation experiments for real workflows, including browser agents, orchestration, memory systems, and business use cases.
desc.zh: 面向真实业务场景的 AI 自动化实践，包括浏览器代理、工作流编排、记忆系统与企业应用。

longDesc.en: OpenClaw Practice is an evolving collection of practical AI automation experiments. It explores how LLMs, browser agents, and workflow orchestration can be applied to real-world business scenarios. The project serves as both a learning lab and a production-ready toolkit for building deterministic, reliable AI systems.
longDesc.zh: OpenClaw Practice 是一系列不断演进的 AI 自动化实验集合。它探索如何将大语言模型、浏览器代理和工作流编排应用于真实的业务场景。该项目既是一个学习实验室，也是一个面向生产环境的工具包，用于构建确定性、可靠的 AI 系统。

en: Browser agent automation for web-based workflows
LLM orchestration with deterministic output pipelines
Memory systems for long-running agent sessions
Integration patterns for traditional business systems
zh: 基于浏览器代理的 Web 工作流自动化
具备确定性输出管道的 LLM 编排
面向长期运行代理会话的记忆系统
与传统业务系统的集成模式
AI
自动化

desc.en: An integrated build across brand, commerce, content, and digital infrastructure.
desc.zh: 围绕品牌、电商、内容与数字系统的一体化构建实践。

longDesc.en: CosmosMala is a full-stack brand and commerce project that integrates online retail, content marketing, and digital operations into a unified system. From product photography to inventory management, every piece of the business is connected through custom-built digital infrastructure.
longDesc.zh: CosmosMala 是一个全栈品牌与电商项目，将线上零售、内容营销与数字化运营整合到一个统一系统中。从产品拍摄到库存管理，业务的每个环节都通过自建的数字基础设施相互连接。

en: Custom WooCommerce storefront with Tibetan-inspired design
Content marketing pipeline with bilingual SEO
Automated social media and CRM workflows
zh: 具有藏式设计风格的定制 WooCommerce 店面
集成库存与订单管理系统
双语 SEO 内容营销管道
自动化社交媒体与 CRM 工作流
电商
品牌

desc.en: A custom ERP system designed for real operations, covering inventory, orders, finance, and workflow automation.
desc.zh: 面向实际经营流程的定制 ERP 系统，涵盖库存、订单、财务与流程自动化。

longDesc.en: BeadERP is a custom-built enterprise resource planning system tailored for small-to-medium businesses. It replaces fragmented spreadsheets and manual processes with a unified platform for inventory tracking, order processing, financial reporting, and workflow automation.
longDesc.zh: BeadERP 是一个专为中小企业量身打造的企业资源规划系统。它用一个统一平台取代了分散的电子表格和手动流程，实现库存跟踪、订单处理、财务报告与工作流自动化。

en: Real-time inventory tracking with barcode scanning
Order lifecycle management from quote to fulfillment
zh: 支持条码扫描的实时库存跟踪
从报价到履约的订单生命周期管理
财务看板与报表
自动化采购与供应商管理
系统
业务

desc.en: A structured personal knowledge management system built on Obsidian, covering notes, workflows, and long-term memory.
desc.zh: 基于 Obsidian 构建的个人知识管理体系，涵盖笔记、工作流与长期记忆系统。

longDesc.en: A comprehensive personal knowledge management system designed around the principles of structured thinking and long-term knowledge retention. Built on Obsidian with heavy customization, it serves as the central hub for research notes, project documentation, and reusable methodology templates.
longDesc.zh: 一套围绕结构化思维与长期知识留存原则设计的综合个人知识管理系统。基于 Obsidian 深度定制，它作为研究笔记、项目文档和可复用方法论模板的中枢。

en: Custom CSS theme with Notion-inspired minimalism
Cross-linked knowledge graph for long-term memory
zh: 受 Notion 启发的极简自定义 CSS 主题
基于 Dataview 的看板与任务跟踪
基于 Templater 的工作流自动化
用于长期记忆的交叉链接知识图谱
知识管理
Obsidian
